title: Enterprise Strategy
description: Comprehensive strategic planning that aligns business objectives with market opportunities and organizational capabilities.
process: Discovery → Analysis → Strategy Design → Roadmap → Implementation Support
deliverables: Strategic blueprint · Market assessment · Growth roadmap · Business case

title: Digital Product Development
description: Design and engineering of world-class digital products that delight users and drive business results.
process: Research → Ideation → Prototyping → Development → Launch → Iterate
deliverables: Product strategy · UX/UI design · MVP · Production platform · Analytics

title: Cloud Migration & Modernization
description: Seamless migration of legacy systems to modern cloud platforms with minimal disruption and maximum value.
process: Assessment → Planning → Migration → Optimization → Managed Services
deliverables: Cloud strategy · Migration plan · Architecture design · Runbooks · SLA framework

title: Data Analytics & Intelligence
description: Building data-driven organizations with advanced analytics platforms and actionable business intelligence.
process: Data Audit → Architecture → Integration → Analytics → Insights Delivery
deliverables: Data platform · Dashboards · Predictive models · Data governance · Training

title: Organizational Transformation
description: Reshaping organizations for agility, efficiency, and sustainable performance through people, process, and culture change.
deliverables: Org design · Change roadmap · Training programs · KPI framework · Culture audit

title: Cybersecurity Services
description: End-to-end security services from strategy and architecture to managed detection, response, and compliance.
process: Risk Assessment → Architecture → Implementation → Monitoring → Response
deliverables: Security roadmap · Architecture design · SOC setup · Incident playbooks · Compliance
impactMetric: 90% reduction in mean time to detection

title: M&A Advisory & Integration
description: Strategic advisory for mergers, acquisitions, and post-merger integration to maximize deal value and accelerate synergies.
process: Target Screening → Due Diligence → Valuation → Integration Planning → Execution
deliverables: Deal thesis · Due diligence report · Integration playbook · Synergy tracker

title: Supply Chain & Operations
description: Optimizing end-to-end supply chains and operational processes for resilience, efficiency, and competitive advantage.
process: Mapping → Analysis → Redesign → Technology Enablement → Continuous Improvement
deliverables: Process maps · Optimization models · Technology roadmap · Performance dashboards

title: Sustainability & ESG
description: Integrating sustainability into core business strategy with measurable ESG frameworks and reporting capabilities.
process: Materiality Assessment → Strategy → Implementation → Reporting → Assurance
deliverables: ESG strategy · Carbon roadmap · Sustainability report · Stakeholder framework

title: Talent & Leadership
description: Building high-performance teams and developing leaders who can drive transformation and organizational excellence.
process: Assessment → Strategy → Development Programs → Coaching → Measurement
deliverables: Talent strategy · Leadership programs · Succession plans · Culture framework
